# Contributing to Toolost SDK Docs

The canonical contribution guide is in the repository root:

- https://github.com/toolostjs/toolost/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md

This file adds docs-specific expectations.

## Docs Guidelines

- Keep navigation and cross-links consistent in both locales.
- For content changes in English, update the German counterpart in the same PR where practical.
- Use explicit fenced code block languages.
- Keep examples realistic and aligned with the current SDK API.

## Review Checklist

1. Run docs locally with `pnpm dev`.
2. Run `pnpm build` before opening a PR.
3. Confirm there are no broken links in touched pages.
4. Verify language parity for changed sections.

## Scope

Use this docs site for SDK docs only. Core policy files and broader project governance live at repository root.
